selection_scope: format_definition_only; no quantized runtime or complete artifact implemented
clamping: saturate to [-127, 127]; -128 is reserved and never emitted
zero_row: scale=0 and every quantized value=0; reconstruction=0
non_finite_input: reject NaN and infinity before quantization

serialization.padding: zero padding to 64-byte boundaries; padding excluded from logical tensor lengths
serialization.metadata: canonical sorted JSON descriptor followed by INT8 payload and F32 scales
serialization.determinism: same source bytes and descriptor produce byte-identical payload, scales, and hashes

selection_rationale.per_tensor: rejected: largest representative weighted expert error 0.4204293
selection_rationale.per_output_channel: selected: 0.1043549 maximum weighted error, 4.200218x modeled compression, simple row-wise metadata, portable correctness-first implementation
selection_rationale.input_group_128: promising_but_requires_more_evidence: lower 0.0820999 maximum weighted error but 2.81 percent more bytes and more indexing complexity

future_extension: axis/group metadata leaves a compatible path for group-wise formats and later Q4 research without changing the F32 artifact
